ns0:entry.ns0:title: AlexsJones/llmfit
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AlexsJones/llmfit
Language: rust
Hundreds of models & providers. One command to find what runs on your hardware.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: GitoxideLabs/gitoxide
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/GitoxideLabs/gitoxide
Language: rust
An idiomatic, lean, fast & safe pure Rust implementation of Git

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Universal-Debloater-Alliance/universal-android-debloater-next-generation
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Universal-Debloater-Alliance/universal-android-debloater-next-generation
Language: rust
Cross-platform GUI written in Rust using ADB to debloat non-rooted Android devices. Improve your privacy, the security and battery life of your device.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: biomejs/biome
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/biomejs/biome
Language: rust
A toolchain for web projects, aimed to provide functionalities to maintain them. Biome offers formatter and linter, usable via CLI and LSP.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dbt-labs/dbt-core
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dbt-labs/dbt-core
Language: rust
dbt enables data analysts and engineers to transform their data using the same practices that software engineers use to build applications.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: denoland/deno
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/denoland/deno
Language: rust
A modern runtime for JavaScript and TypeScript.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dmtrKovalenko/fff
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dmtrKovalenko/fff
Language: rust
The fastest and the most accurate file search toolkit for AI agents, Neovim, Rust, C, and NodeJS

ns0:entry.ns0:title: eclipse-zenoh/zenoh
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/eclipse-zenoh/zenoh
Language: rust
zenoh unifies data in motion, data in-use, data at rest and computations. It carefully blends traditional pub/sub with geo-distributed storages, queries and computations, while retaining a level of time and space efficiency that is well beyond any of the mainstream stacks.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: facebook/pyrefly
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/facebook/pyrefly
Language: rust
A fast type checker and language server for Python

ns0:entry.ns0:title: farion1231/cc-switch
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/farion1231/cc-switch
Language: rust
A cross-platform desktop All-in-One assistant for Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, OpenClaw, Gemini CLI & Hermes Agent. Only official website: ccswitch.io

ns0:entry.ns0:title: leptos-rs/leptos
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/leptos-rs/leptos
Language: rust
Build fast web applications with Rust.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
